common.appDescription: Convert YouTube video subtitles to formatted Markdown documents with timestamps and links.

header.title: YouTube Subtitle to Markdown
header.subtitle: Convert YouTube subtitles to formatted Markdown

input.placeholder: Enter YouTube URL or video ID...
input.errorRequired: Please enter a YouTube URL or video ID
input.errorInvalid: Invalid YouTube URL or video ID. Please check and try again.

hero.title: Convert YouTube Subtitles to Markdown
hero.description: Paste a YouTube video URL below to extract subtitles and convert them to a beautifully formatted Markdown document.

cleanMarkdown.title: Clean Markdown
cleanMarkdown.description: Get properly formatted Markdown with timestamps, clickable links, and video metadata.

multiLanguage.title: Multi-language
multiLanguage.description: Choose from available subtitle languages including auto-generated captions.

fastReliable.title: Fast & Reliable
fastReliable.description: Powered by WebAssembly for fast parsing with JavaScript fallback.

language.startOver: Start over with a different video

errors.fetchVideoInfo: Could not fetch video information. Please check the video ID and try again.
errors.noSubtitles: This video doesn't have any subtitles available. Please try a different video.
errors.fetchLanguagesWithSuggestion: Please try again or check if the video has subtitles.
errors.fetchSubtitles: Could not fetch subtitles. This may be due to network restrictions or the video may not have subtitles for this language. Please try again or use a VPN if you're in a restricted region.
errors.fetchSubtitlesGeneric: Failed to fetch subtitles. Please check your network connection and try again.

footer.text: YouTube Subtitle to Markdown Converter • Built with Next.js
